title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: IBM and Red Hat's Project Lightwell is a $5 billion investment combining AI-augmented engineers and a security clearinghouse to harden the open source ecosystem. The podcast also covers SymJack, an attack technique that exploits AI coding agents by tricking them into overwriting configuration files while bypassing human-in-the-loop checks. LayerX's report shows uneven AI adoption across organizations, concentrating power-user access while fragmenting supply chains.
